data.title: 国际服网页活动「Sheside outside Countdown Event」

data.body:
[Sheside outside Countdown Event! #1]

Sensei! There are countdown coupons prepared for you in celebration of Sheside outside update! 
Starting today, there's going to be one coupon each day, for a total of three coupons! Please make sure to use them!

🗓️Use Period: Until 2/8 (Sat), 2:59 PM (UTC)
➡️View Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2718221

#BlueArchive
